address_family.description: The type of IP address, either IPv4 or IPv6.

allocation_default_netmask_length.description: The default netmask length for IP allocations from this pool.

allocation_max_netmask_length.description: The maximum netmask length that can be allocated from this pool.

allocation_min_netmask_length.description: The minimum netmask length that can be allocated from this pool.

allocation_resource_tags.description: Tags applied to resources allocated from this pool.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IPAM pool.

auto_import.description: Indicates whether resources in the pool are automatically imported.

aws_service.description: The AWS service associated with the IPAM pool.

description.description: A description of the IPAM pool.

ipam_scope_id.description: The ID of the IPAM scope this pool belongs to.

ipam_scope_type.description: The type of IPAM scope, either public or private.

locale.description: The locale of the IPAM pool, indicating its region.

pool_depth.description: The depth of the pool in the IPAM hierarchy.

publicly_advertisable.description: Indicates if the pool can be publicly advertised.

source_ipam_pool_id.description: The ID of the source IPAM pool, if applicable.

state.description: The current state of the IPAM pool.

tags.description: Key-value pairs of tags associated with the IPAM pool.
